text.tspan: ▪ Temporary relief of pain and itching associated
with minor burns, sunburns and insect bites.
▪ Do not use in large quantities, particularly over raw
Stop use and ask a doctor if
Symptoms persist for more than 7 days or clear up and
occur again within a few days.
Keep out of reach of children.
medical help or contact a Poison Control Center right
Adults and children 2 years of age and
older: Apply to affected area not more than 3 to 4 times
daily. Children under 2 years of age: Consult a doctor.
Montana Flower, Betaine, Butylene Glycol, Citric Acid
Manufactured for DermaSoZo LLC, Addison TX 75001
